title: School Holidays | Tandem IMS
text: SCHOOL HOLIDAYS early years & pre-School kindergarten & primary Progynmasium, Kurzgymnasium + 10th grade Gymi-Preparation Autumn Holiday Calendar Week 42 (until July 2026) Calendar Weeks 41-42 Calendar Weeks 41-42 Christmas Holidays 2 weeks over Christmas/New Year 2 weeks over Christmas/New Year 2 weeks over Christmas/New Year Sport Holidays Calendar Week 7 (until July 2026) Calendar Weeks 7-8 Calendar Weeks 7-8 Spring Holidays Calendar Week 17 (until July 2026) Calendar Weeks 17-18 (week 16 & 17 if Easter Monday is in week 16) Calendar Weeks 17-18 (week 16 & 17 if Easter Monday is in week 16) Summer Holidays Calendar Weeks 29-33 (as of August 2026 CW 30-31) Calendar Weeks 29-33 Calendar Weeks 29-33 During the two 'Christmas Holiday' weeks and 'Summer Holiday' weeks 30 & 31, Tandem IMS is completely closed and there is no care available. During the other weeks, there is generally either Holiday Care (until July 2026) or Holiday Camp on offer, depending on the age group. Additional closed days during a school year: public holidays and 4-5 training days for staff. Contact Us
